title: CompactifAI Dashboard
description: A customer-facing dashboard developed as part of an international software engineering team at Multiverse Computing. Contributed to front-end features, dashboard interfaces, billing and usage-related UI, design system components, bug fixing, testing, code reviews, and collaboration with QA testers, backend engineers, product managers, and designers.

title: Biyo POS
description: A commercial website for an all-in-one POS platform focused on restaurants, retail, online ordering, inventory management, kiosk mode, reporting, and business operations. Worked on front-end implementation and UI improvements for a real business website, focusing on clean page structure, reusable sections, and production-ready delivery.

title: P.Slate
description: A front-end scheduling planner designed for Prince Sultan University students. The app helps students search courses, select sections, generate conflict-free schedules, compare weekly timetable options, copy section numbers for registration, and estimate tuition costs. Built as a fully functional front-end product with bilingual English and Arabic support.

title: QueTocaHoy
description: A collaborative full stack web app that helps families and groups stay organized with daily tasks, recipes, and shopping lists. Built from scratch, starting locally with MySQL, later migrated to PostgreSQL, deployed on Render and Vercel

title: Kazkovyi Dim
description: A website for a children's party agency with dynamic content, built using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Sanity CMS. It allows visitors to browse services, photos and information about entertainers. Includes an admin panel for content editing after authorization.

title: The Recipe Compass
description: A recipe management system built using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Firebase for the backend, and the Unsplash API for image integration. The app allows users to post their own recipes, comment on other users recipes, and create personal accounts.

title: Building Estimator
description: Building Price Estimator is a web application that helps users calculate the estimated cost of constructing residential or commercial buildings. It offers a user-friendly interface to input various construction parameters and calculate cost with PDF document generation.

title: Buidl & Borrow
description: A decentralized app (dApp) built on Radix during a hackathon. It uses Scrypto for smart contracts, JavaScript for the frontend, Firebase for data, and Tailwind CSS for styling. The dApp enables users to lend and borrow assets in a decentralized manner, providing a secure and transparent financial ecosystem.

title: Pokemon Search App
description: I built this project to learn TypeScript. The app allows users to search for Pokémon, filter by type, and sort the list, providing a hands-on way to practice TypeScript with Next.js.

title: Parallax Magical Forest
description: Developed a visually engaging project featuring a parallax effect and smooth scroll control, implemented using the GSAP library. Leveraged HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to create a seamless, interactive user experience.
